Name: Vapour Product Retailers
Description: A Vapour Product Retailer is any retail store that sells vapour products, such as e-cigarettes.

Name: Smoke Shops and Stores Which Sell Cigars and Cigarettes
Description: Businesses that sell cigarettes and tobacco products are required to obtain a Smoke Shop licence.

Name: Taxicab Brokerages
Description: Taxicab brokerages or brokers are any person who accepts requests to connect individuals with taxicabs. Methods include using a smartphone or similar technology.

Name: Taxicab Operators
Description: The taxicab operator licence is required to manage a taxicab or multiple taxicabs. A taxicab owner can only designate one taxicab operator to manage their taxicab. Taxicab operators also can manage more than one taxicab at a time.

Name: Taxicab Owner
Description: A licence is required to own a taxi. Licences can be purchased, transferred to an estate or obtained from the waiting list.

Name: Taxicab Owner – Estate
Description: Transfer an existing Taxicab Owner licence into the name of an Estate.

Name: Taxicab Owner – Sale
Description: Purchase an existing Taxicab Owner licence from another owner.

Name: Temporary Sign (New Development)
Description: Development signs are used for new building developments, such as condominiums, townhouses or other new homes. To keep the city's sidewalks clear for pedestrians and to ensure the safety of the right-of-way, these signs are required to have permits.

Name: Temporary Sign (Mobile)
Description: Mobile signs are used for advertising various events, activities and promotions.To keep the city's sidewalks clear for pedestrians and to ensure the safety of the right-of-way, these signs are required to have permits.

Name: Temporary Sign (A Frame)
Description: A-frame signs can be placed in front of a business. To keep the city's sidewalks clear for pedestrians and to ensure the safety of the right-of-way, these signs are required to have permits.

Name: Temporary Sign (Portable)
Description: Portable signs are rigid free-standing moveable signs which are not fastened to the ground or any structure. To keep the city’s sidewalks clear for pedestrians and to ensure the safety of the right-of-way, these signs are required to have permits.

Name: Tow Truck Drivers
Description: Tow truck drivers must obtain a licence to drive or operate a tow truck.

Name: Tow Truck Owners
Description: A licence is required to own and operate a “tow truck”. These refer to a motor vehicle that the public can pay to tow other vehicles. Individual owners may drive their tow truck without obtaining a separate tow truck driver licence.

Name: Amusement Establishment
Description: Businesses including arcades, axe throwing, billiards/pool halls, bowling alleys, carnivals, escape rooms, internet cafes, miniature golf course, roller-skating rinks, etc. require a licence to operate.

Name: Private Transportation Companies (Uber, Lyft etc) & Drivers
Description: A Private Transportation Company (PTC) connects passengers with drivers of private vehicles through an application. All trips must be booked through the PTC’s “app”. Private Transportation Company and its drivers must be licensed.

Name: Car Rental Business
Description: Businesses that rent out vehicles to the public for personal use.

Name: Body Piercing, Electrolysis, Hair Salon, Nail Shop, Tattoo, Waxing and Other Personal Services
Description: Businesses that provide personal services are required to obtain a “Personal Service Settings” licence.

Name: Body Rub Parlour
Description: Body rub parlours are any place where non-medical or non-therapeutic massaging services are provided by someone other than registered massage therapists, or other licensed or registered holistic practitioners. Those who own or operate body rub parlours are required to have a Body Rub Parlour licence.

Name: Body Rubber
Description: Those who provide services in a Body Rub Parlour are required to obtain a Body Rubber licence.

Name: Building Cleaner
Description: A person who cleans or restores the exterior of buildings/structures using pressurized air, water, steam, sand or other abrasives is required to obtain a licence.

Name: Building Renovators
Description: A person who repairs or renovates buildings/structures, including anyone who advertises themselves as a renovator, is required to obtain a licence.

Name: Buskers & Sidewalk Performers
Description: Buskers play music or otherwise perform for voluntary donations in the street. Examples of buskers are: singers, jugglers and mimes.

Name: Carwash, Gas Station or Public Garage
Description: A licence is required to operate body shop/car repair shop, car wash, gas station, car dealership or public garage.

Name: Clothing Drop Box Location Permit
Description: Clothing Drop Boxes placed on private property need to obtain and display a permit.

Name: Commercial Parking Lot
Description: Commercial parking lots where people are charged to park a vehicle require a licence. Operators of the commercial parking lots are required to obtain a licence for each lot.

Name: Driveway Paving Contractor
Description: A person or business who repaves residential and commercial driveways.

Name: Driving School Instructors (Who Do Not Own Vehicle)
Description: If you provide driving instruction in a vehicle for a driving school that is not registered to you.

Name: Driving School Instructors (Who Own Vehicle)
Description: If you provide driving instruction in a vehicle for a driving school that is owned by you.

Name: Driving School Operators (In-Class Training Only)
Description: Driving School Operator who operates the in-class portion only.

Name: Driving School Operators (In-Vehicle Training)
Description: Driving School Operators who operate a driving school with in-vehicle instruction.

Name: Drain Contractor
Description: A Drain Contractor repairs, constructs, installs and/or cleans drainage works including weeping tile beds and septic tank systems.

Name: Drain Layer
Description: A Drain Layer is a person who does drain laying, weeping tile installing, septic tank installing, drain reconstruction, or repair or removing tree roots or other obstructions from drains, or private drain connections.

Name: Food Trucks
Description: To operate a Food Truck, a licence is required.

Name: Food Truck Vending
Description: Vendors wishing to operate on the city's streets or commercial parking lots require a vending permit.

Name: Food Carts
Description: To operate a food cart, hot dog cart or food bike, a licence is required.

Name: Refreshment Vehicle Driver
Description: Any driver of a food or ice cream truck.

Name: Sidewalk Vending
Description: Vendors wishing to operate on the city's sidewalks also require a vending permit.

Name: Ice Cream Trucks
Description: To operate a ice cream truck, a licence is required.

Name: Ice Cream Vending
Description: Vendors wishing to operate on the city's streets or commercial parking lots also require a vending permit.

Name: Sale of Fireworks
Description: The sale of fireworks requires a permit. There are five types of permits to sell fireworks on a temporary or permanent basis.

Name: Eating or Drinking Establishment
Description: Restaurants, cafes, bars, pubs and other eating and drinking establishments must have a licence

Name: Expanded Activity Eating or Drinking Establishment
Description: Restaurants, cafes, bars, pubs and other eating and drinking establishments must have a licence.

Name: Take-out or Retail Food Establishment
Description: Business where food or beverages are offered to patrons for consumption off-site

Name: Sales Using a Push Cart
Description: Hawker/Pedlars with push cart are mobile salespeople who sell a variety of goods from a cart.

Name: Sales On Foot
Description: Hawker/Pedlars on foot are mobile salespeople who sell a variety of goods from from door-to-door and on the city streets.

Name: Sales With Motor Vehicle
Description: Hawker/pedlars with mobile vehicle are mobile salespeople who sell a variety of goods from a motorized vehicle.

Name: Pedlar Assistant
Description: Hawker/Pedlars assistants are mobile salespeople that help and are employed by individuals who sell a variety of goods.

Name: Heating Contractor
Description: Heating contractors installing warm air, hot water or steam heating equipment of any kind (except oil tanks and oil and gas burners) require a licence. This includes anyone who advertises themselves as a heating contractor.

Name: Holistic Centre
Description: Any premises in which holistic services are provided or offered.

Name: Holistic Practitioner
Description: Holistic Practitioners are individuals who work in a holistic centre providing a variety of services for medical or therapeutic treatment.

Name: Insulation Installer
Description: A person who installs insulation materials in both residential homes and commercial buildings.

Name: Jewellery Buyers and Precious Metal Shops
Description: Any person who buys, sells, or deals in old gold and other precious metals for the purpose of smelting and recovering the same metals and jewellery.

Name: Laundromats, Laundry Depots & Dry Cleaning
Description: Laundromats, laundry depots, washing/ironing services, and dry cleaning related services require a licence.

Name: Taxi and Limo Driver
Description: If you drive a limousine or taxi for money, you must obtain a Vehicle-for-Hire Driver Licence.

Name: Limousine Owner
Description: All individuals who own a limousine to be driven for money, must be licensed.

Name: Limousine Service Company
Description: A company that accepts calls for booking, arranging or providing limousine transportation is required to obtain a licence.

Name: Entertainment Establishment/Nightclub
Description: A business where amplified music is provided for entertainment or dancing requires licence(s)

Name: Marketing Displays
Description: Businesses can apply for an outdoor marketing display to display merchandise on the sidewalk in front of their business. The merchandise sold inside and outside must be the same.

Name: Pawn Shops
Description: A pawn shop is a shop or business who loans money to people who bring in valuable items which they leave with the pawnbroker.

Name: Pet Shops
Description: This includes shops or places where animals, including birds are being sold.

Name: Pedicab Owner
Description: A "pedicab" is a vehicle that can be pulled or pushed by a person, with or without an electric motor. A pedal-powered rickshaw is also considered a pedicab. The pedicab owner is required to be licensed.

Name: Pedicab Driver
Description: An individual who operates a pedicab. A "pedicab" is a vehicle that can be pulled or pushed by a person, with or without an electric motor. A pedal-powered rickshaw is also considered a pedicab. The pedicab driver is required to be licensed.

Name: Master Heating Installer
Description: A master heating installer engages in planning, installing and connecting warm air, hot water or steam heating equipment of any kind, including air conditioning and ventilating systems.

Name: Plumbing & Heating Contractor
Description: A person planning, supervising, employing people performing or installing plumbing and heating work require a licence.

Name: Plumbing Contractor
Description: A plumbing contractor is a person engaged in the business of contracting and/or repairing plumbing installations, or advertising themselves as a plumbing contractor.

Name: Private Parking Enforcement Agency
Description: A Private Parking Enforcement Agency (PPEA) undertakes parking enforcement activities such as issuing tags, tickets or notices on private property, for example a plaza parking lot on behalf of someone else.

Name: Second Hand Shop Licence
Description: Businesses that sell or exchange second-hand goods from a shop or store or a person who goes from house to house to collect or purchase second-hand goods.

Name: Second Hand Salvage Shop
Description: Businesses that have indoor storage of scrap metal, vehicles and tires for sale.

Name: Master Plumber
Description: A master plumber is a person who engages in planning, supervising and installing of plumbing and employs people who perform plumbing work.

Name: Second Hand Salvage Yard
Description: Businesses that have outdoor storage of scrap metal, vehicles and tires for sale.

Name: Auctioneer
Description: A person who sells items through a public auction must be licensed.

Name: Sidewalk Café
Description: Restaurant/cafe owners can apply for a sidewalk patio (boulevard cafe) permit to allow them to serve on the public right-of-way (sidewalk).

Name: Adult Entertainment Club Owner/Operator
Description: Owners person who, alone or with others, possesses or occupies and operators who manages, supervises, runs, or controls operations of an adult entertainment club.

Name: Adult Entertainment Club Designated Manager
Description: A designated manager is someone who manages, supervises or controls the daily or shift operations of a club on behalf of an owner or operator.

Name: Adult Entertainer (Dancer)
Description: An Adult Entertainment Club Entertainer (dancer) that performs at adult entertainment clubs must obtain a licence.

Name: Noise Exemption Permit
Description: Noise exemption permits can be requested for special events, events in parks and construction that extends beyond permitted hours.

Name: Graffiti Art Exemption
Description: To re-categorized graffiti on your property as graffiti art, you can obtain a graffiti art exemption.

Name: Other Businesses, Trades or Professions
Description: Additional licences you may require a permit, business, or trade licence to operate.

Name: Landscape Construction
Description: If you are planning to undertake any landscaping work within the public right of way (the area beyond your property line), you will require a permit prior to starting work.

Name: Fire Hydrant Use
Description: The City of Toronto grants Permits to allow the use of water from fire hydrants for specific purposes.

Name: Fire Hydrant Flow Test
Description: Property owners, developers and contractors designing or upgrading a private fire flow system can apply for a Permit to test the flow rate and pressure of certain hydrants.

Name: Sewer Discharge
Description: Sewer Discharge Permits and Agreements are required when private water (water not purchased from the City) is discharged into the City’s sewer system.

Name: First Party Sign
Description: First Party signs are used to identify your business or service located on the property.

Name: Third Party Sign
Description: Third Party signs are used to advertise businesses or services not available at the property.

Name: Injure or Remove Trees
Description: If you wish to damage or remove a tree protected under City bylaws, you must obtain a permit.

Name: Undertake Work in Ravines
Description: If your property is located within a ravine protected area, you may be required to apply for a permit to injure or remove a tree, dump fill, or alter the grade of land.

Name: Building Permit
Description: A building permit is your formal permission to begin the construction, demolition, addition or renovation on your property.

Name: Residential On-Street Parking
Description: A residential on-street permit entitles permit holding residents to park their automobile on the street within a specified area exclusively during permit parking hours.

Name: Residential Front Yard & Boulevard Parking
Description: An off-street parking permit is required if you wish to park in your front yard or on part of the City boulevard.

Name: Temporary On-Street Parking
Description: Temporary resident or visitor permits may be obtained to provide 24-hour, 48-hour and weekly on-street parking within the limits of a permit parking street or area provided space is available.

Name: Commercial Boulevard Parking
Description: An off-street parking permit is required if commercial property owners wish to rent part of the City boulevard to supplement space on private property for parking.

Name: Car-Share Vehicle Parking
Description: Car-share Organizations/Companies can submit applications to Transportation Services for the creation of on-street car-share vehicle parking areas (CVPAs).

Name: Filming Permit
Description: The Toronto Film, Television and Digital Media Office co-ordinates all location filming within the city and provides industry development support to the local screen-based community.

Name: Pet Licence
Description: All dogs and cats owned in Toronto must be licensed and wear a tag. The licence must be renewed every year.

Name: Commercial Dog Walker Permit
Description: Permits are available for individuals to walk four to six dogs on a commercial basis.

Name: Bingo Licence
Description: Bingo licences may be issued for events at one of the three Commercial Bingo halls in Toronto or in a public place.

Name: Raffles
Description: The City licences raffles to eligible non-profit charitable organizations with prizes up to $50,000.

Name: Break Open Tickets
Description: The City licences organizations to sell Break Open Tickets at legions, hospitals and variety stores.

Name: Lottery Events at a Bazaar
Description:
The City licences lottery events at a bazaar where any combination of the following are held:

Raffle with prizes up to $500
Bingo with prizes up to $500
A maximum three wheels of fortune with a $2 bet
Penny auction raffle

Name: Fence Standards and Exemption
Description: There are standards for fence height and structure in Toronto. If you have a swimming pool, you need to have a particular type of fence. If you need your fence to be taller for a specific reason, you have to apply for a fence exemption permit.

Name: Temporary Sign Providers
Description: Businesses that apply for, manage, and monitor temporary signs.

Name: Clothing Drop Box Operator Licence
Description: Operators that apply for, manage, and monitor clothing drop boxes.

Name: Private School Bus or School Transportation Drivers
Description: Any driver that uses a bus or vehicle to transport children to school privately.

Name: Sidewalk (Chalk) Artist
Description: Chalk artists create drawings on the sidewalk for voluntary donations in the street.

Name: Portrait Artist
Description: Individuals that make and sell on-site portraits.

Name: Entertainment Places of Assembly
Description: A business that is used as a performing arts space, live music performance venue or any other establishment that offers entertainment or performances for patrons.

Name: Expanded Activity Entertainment Places of Assembly
Description: A business that is used as a performing arts space, live music performance venue or any other establishment that offers entertainment or performances for patrons.

Name: Traveling Salesperson (Non-Resident)
Description: A person who has not resided in the City of Toronto for the past three months that sells items to the public.

Name: Chimney Repairman
Description: A person or business that repairs chimneys.

Name: Second Hand Goods Collector with Vehicle
Description: Businesses the collect secondhand items with a vehicle on City streets.

Name: Marriage
Description: A marriage licence is required to get married in Ontario.

Name: Municipal Road Damage Deposit
Description: A municipal road damage deposit (MRDD) is a written and financial commitment from a property owner to submit a deposit with the City of Toronto as a guarantee against damage to the curb, sidewalk, road, boulevard and other City services located in municipal boulevards, as well as any clean-up of the adjoining street.

Name: Street Occupation Permit
Description: You will require a street occupation permit prior to starting a demolition, renovation and/or construction project if you are planning to temporarily occupy any portion of the public right of way.

Name: Street Furniture Publication Box Licence
Description: Publishers should apply for permits and install and maintain publication boxes within the public right-of-way.

Name: Mechanical (HVAC) Permit - Stand-alone
Description: Stand-alone Mechanical (HVAC) Building Permit for work which is not related to other construction proposed for a building.

Name: Related Mechanical (HVAC) Permit
Description: A Mechanical (HVAC) Permit is needed is your project includes HVAC elements.

Name: Plumbing and Drain Permits - Stand-alone
Description: A stand-alone Plumbing Building Permit is needed or work which is not related to other construction proposed for a building.

Name: Related Plumbing and Drain Permits
Description: A stand-alone Plumbing Building Permit is required for work which is related to other construction proposed for a building.

Name: Residential Demolition Permit (with Replacement Building)
Description: A permit is required to demolish an existing house to allow a new house to be built on the site.

Name: Pool Fence Enclosure
Description: A Building Permit is required for a new pool enclosure for an existing house.

Name: Temporary Street Closure
Description: If you are planning to temporarily close the street fully or partially to occupy a curb-lane, sidewalk or boulevard for a race, run, walk or festival, you must apply for a Street Closure Permit.

Name: Banner
Description: A banner is a temporary sign that is suspended on, across or along a street, or a flag of non-rigid material that is suspended from a rigid arm fixed to a pole or utility pole.

Name: Sidewalk Sale
Description: A permit is needed for a sidewalk sale, or the display and sale of merchandise from a stand on the City sidewalk or boulevard fronting your store.

Name: Licence to Operate a Retail Store
Description: The Municipal Information for a Retail Store Authorization form provided by the Alcohol and Gaming Commission of Ontario (AGCO).

Name: Licence to Serve Alcohol
Description: To serve alcohol in Toronto you will need a liquor licence from the Alcohol and Gaming Commission of Ontario (AGCO). Certain licences require that you serve notice to the City Clerk or are required to get municipal clearance or approvals from the City of Toronto.

Name: Multi-Tenant Homes (Rooming Houses)
Description: Rooming houses can include a house, apartment or building where you rent a room and share a kitchen and/or washroom with four or more people (not related to you) that pay individual rent.

Name: Opening or Modifying a Child Care Centre
Description: When applying for a new license or requesting a revision to an existing license, the program must comply with relevant municipal requirements.

Name: Fire/Security Upgrades
Description: Building Permit for the stand-alone replacement or alteration of the life-safety systems of a building, such as sprinklers, fire alarms or the installation of electromagnetic locking devices (Maglocks).

Name: Portable Classroom
Description: Building permit for the placement of a portable classroom on the site of an existing school.

Name: Designated Structures
Description: Building Permit for the construction of a designated structure, such as communication towers, crane runways, exterior tanks and supports, pedestrian bridges, retaining walls, satellite dishes and solar collectors.

Name: Tents & Temporary Structures
Description: Building Permit for the temporary construction of a structure, such as a Tent or a Temporary Sales Pavilion.

Name: Payday Loan Establishments
Description: Any premises, or any part of the premises that operates as a payday lending business as defined by the Payday Loans Act.

Name: Photography Permit
Description: A permit is required for commercial or formal photography such as an extended photo shoot or wedding photography, in City Parks and Recreation facilities.

Name: Rental Renovation Licence Bylaw
Description: The Rental Renovation Licence Bylaw requires landlords to obtain a licence before starting repairs or renovations that require tenants to move out of their rental units under the Provincial N13 process.
